name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants, Prepare, VoteYes, VoteNo, Commit, Abort, Coordinator, AllParticipants, AllMessages, AllVotes, AllDecisions

VARIABLES participants, messages, votes, decisions

Init == /\ participants = Participants
        /\ messages = <<>>
        /\ votes = <<>>
        /\ decisions = <<>>

Next == /\ messages' = Append(messages, <<Prepare, Coordinator, AllParticipants>>)
        /\ votes' = Append(votes, <<VoteYes, Coordinator, AllParticipants>>)
        /\ decisions' = Append(decisions, <<Commit, Coordinator, AllParticipants>>)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, messages, votes, decisions>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states



(* TLA+ translation of the algorithm *)

(* Helper function to get the next philosopher/fork index *)
Next(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial condition: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE] /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation: each philosopher can transition from thinking to hungry, 
   from hungry to eating if forks are free, and from eating to thinking after putting down forks *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = FALSE /\ forks[Next(i)] = FALSE
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![Next(i)] = TRUE]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ states[i] = "eating" /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![Next(i)] = FALSE]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant: forks are either free or owned by a single philosopher *)
TypeOK == 
  \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in BOOLEAN /\ forks[Next(i)] \in BOOLEAN

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag


define
  maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
  choose(i) == LET
    maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
  IN



  end
  next(i) == LET
    maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
  IN



    \E j \in 1..N : j /= i /\ flag[j] /\ (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i))

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, count

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
                 /\ count' = count + 1
                 /\ queue' = Append(queue, head)

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ count' = count - 1
                 /\ queue' = Tail(queue)

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
        /\ K > 0
        /\ queue \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, head, tail, count>>

(* State definitions *)
Follower == state = Follower
Candidate == state = Candidate
Leader == state = Leader

(* Type definitions *)
Server == 1..N
None == 0

(* TypeOK definition *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

        /\ votedFor = None

       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = readers \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store



Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
        /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] = 0

Next == /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ \E k \in Keys :
          /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> 0]

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = IF lastChunk \in sentChunks THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE 0
    /\ channelState' = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> IF i = lastChunk THEN 1 ELSE channelState[i]]
    /\ lastChunk \in 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ lastChunk \notin sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>

====
